title: Deal Me In
editorialSummary: Card games sorted by family mechanic: trick-taking (Bridge, Whist, Hearts, Euchre), matching/rummy (Gin Rummy, Canasta, Mahjong, Phase 10), shedding (Uno, Crazy Eights, President, Spit), and banking/gambling (Blackjack, Baccarat, War, Faro). Each game is a canonical representative of its mechanic family.

meta.gptRationale: Card and table game families are fairly concrete, though some titles are region-specific and a few category borders are not obvious.
